title: TechBlock - SkyTech II
description: SkyTech is official modpack for server network - TechBlock.pl
body:
If you're looking for a long, interesting and challenging modpack, you've come to the right place.
You can find hundreds of quests, hundreds of changed craftings recipes, custom multi-blocks, original items and much, much more.
This modpack, thanks to an expanded quest system, will allow for a pleasant game even for a player that doesn't play mods everyday.
If you are afraid that you will miss one of the mods, then calmly, thanks to the changed craftings, you need items from various mods to achieve progress. Now just discover the secrets of blood magic, fight bosses with powerful items. Build complex production lines. And most importantly, have fun.

Quests and other things are in Polish

**Website:** https://techblock.pl
